# Hannah Nam — Executive Assistant & Business Operations

> Administrative and operations professional supporting financial services executives with client-service coordination, business operations, compliance support, and office management.

## About

Hannah Nam is an Executive Assistant, Registered Service Assistant, and Business Operations Manager at Five Peaks Capital Group LLC, supporting two financial professionals with administrative, operational, and client-service responsibilities.

## Links

- [Resume Site](https://hannahnam.com)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hannah-nam)

## Expertise

Executive Support, Calendar & Schedule Management, Client Relationship Management, Office Operations, Workflow Coordination, Documentation & Compliance, Financial Plan Coordination, Vendor Management, Financial Services Administration, Securities Compliance, HIPAA Compliance
